_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: the percentage of EdU-positive cells was significantly increased in HSCs with merlin shRNA compared to the control (29.2 ± 6.90% vs. 15.8 ± 3.0%; P = .021)
details: EdU-positive cells increased significantly with merlin shRNA (29.2 ± 6.90% vs. 15.8 ± 3.0%; P = .021)
